calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-03-2020 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-20-2020 Continued To Aug-03-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jose Hernandez in Propria Persona.
Orlando Hernandez in Propria Persona.

Orlando Hernandez stated that he has renounced his claim to the estate. Jose Hernandez stated that he submitted a proposed order about a week or two ago that has a property description. The Court asked Jose to prepare an order that has everything in it for final distribution. The Petition for Final Distribution is continued to August 3, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Jose is to provide a proposed order within one week.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-29-2020 Continued To Jul-20-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-25-2020 Continued To Jun-29-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-02-2020 Continued To Apr-06-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-21-2020 Continued To Mar-02-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jose Hernandez in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that there are still some problems with the petition, that there hasn't been a declaration as to whether either the Petitioner, or his Brother have been incarcerated, that it is required and that it is curious about Orlando's renunciation. Mr. Hernandez stated that he and his Brother had an agreement that while he was at work the Brother would supervise the Mother, that the Brother has some personal issues, that the Brother wasn't there one day when he was supposed to be and the house caught on fire, and that his Mother died a few weeks later due to smoke inhalation. Mr. Hernandez also stated that his Brother wants nothing to do with the property, that he blames himself for his Mother's death and that he tries not to talk to his Brother about it because it is very disturbing to his Brother. The Court stated that the problem with the renunciation is that the Brother is not entitled legally to get anything, that it does not see how the Court can do anything and that there needs to be an amendment to either follow the renunciation, or do something else. The Court also informed Mr. Hernandez that the Victims Compensation Board needs to be noticed and that it needs a proposed order that provides a property description. The Petition for Final Distribution is continued to March 3, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-07-2020 Continued To Jan-21-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-26-2019 Continued To Dec-17-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Nov-26-2019 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Sep-09-2019 Continued To Nov-26-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jose Hernandez, Jr. in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that an inventory and appraisal, and a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is needed. Mr. Hernandez stated that he submitted the inventory to the Court and that he filed a petition for final distribution on Friday with a hearing date of November 26th. The Court informed Mr. Hernandez that the inventory and appraisal needs to be done by a Probate Referee. Status on close of estate/filing of the inventory and appraisal is continued to November 26, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Jun-24-2019 Continued To Sep-09-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jose Hernandez, Jr. in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that it is still missing an inventory and appraisal, and that it needs either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration. Mr. Hernandez stated that he settled with Medi-Cal, that he sent out a rejection letter for the Wells Fargo claim and is waiting for the 90-days to expire, that his youngest Sibling has rejected his claim to the estate and that he will be filing the paper work today. Mr. Hernandez also raised the issue of him being the sole heir. The Court explained to Mr. Hernandez that he is still required to file the documents. Status on close of estate is continued to September 9, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y. S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Jun-04-2019 Continued To Jun-24-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar May-21-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jose Hernandez Jr.

The Court noted that there is no opposition, stated that the matter appears to be in order and that Mr. Hernandez has addressed presumption of revocation. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with (lost) Will Annexed (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
